languages.text: {n}Джай вздыхает:{/n} "Эоганн, шерин, иногда нам всем кажется, что бегство и правда единственный выход. Но прошлое имеет свойство тебя догонять. Поверь, я знаю".

traits.locale_text: [draft] {n}Джай мягко говорит:{/n} "Эоганн, шерин, иногда бегство и правда единственный выход. Но прошлое всегда имеет свойство тебя догонять. Поверь, я знаю".
{n}Джай вздыхает:{/n} "Эоганн, шерин, иногда нам всем кажется, что бегство и правда единственный выход. Но прошлое имеет свойство тебя догонять. Поверь, я знаю".
traits.speaker: JaeCompanion

languages.text: {n}Jae sighs.{/n} "Eogunn, shereen, we all sometimes feel that fleeing is the only way out. But the past has a way of catching up with you. Trust me, I know."
languages.original_text: {n}Джай вздыхает:{/n} "Эоганн, шерин, иногда нам всем кажется, что бегство и правда единственный выход. Но прошлое имеет свойство тебя догонять. Поверь, я знаю".

traits.locale_text: {n}Jae sighs.{/n} "Eogunn, shereen. Sometimes we all feel that fleeing is the only way out. But the past has a way of catching up with you. Trust me, I know."
{n}Jae sighs.{/n} "Eogunn, shereen. Sometimes we all feel that fleeing is the only way out. But the past has a way of catching up with you. Trust me, I know."
{n}Jae sighs.{/n} "Eogunn, shereen, we all sometimes feel that fleeing is the only way out. But the past has a way of catching up with you. Trust me, I know."
{n}Jae sighs.{/n} "Eogunn, shereen, we all sometimes feel that fleeing is the only way out. But the past has a way of catching up with you. Trust me, I know."
{n}Jae sighs.{/n} "Eogunn, shereen, we all sometimes feel that fleeing is the only way out. But the past has a way of catching up with you. Trust me, I know."

languages.text: {n}Jae suspira.{/n} «Eogunn, shereen, a veces todos creemos que escapar es la única salida, pero el pasado siempre termina por alcanzarnos. Hágame caso, sé de lo que hablo».
languages.original_text: {n}Jae sighs.{/n} "Eogunn, shereen, we all sometimes feel that fleeing is the only way out. But the past has a way of catching up with you. Trust me, I know."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jae suspira.{/n} «Eogunn, shereen, a veces todos creemos que escapar es la única salida, pero el pasado siempre termina por alcanzarnos. Hágame caso, sé de lo que hablo».

languages.text: {n}婕伊叹了口气。{/n}“伊奥贡，亲爱的，我们有时会认为逃跑是唯一的出路。可往事总会像讨债鬼一样追上你。相信我，对此我深有体会。”
languages.original_text: {n}Jae sighs.{/n} "Eogunn, shereen, we all sometimes feel that fleeing is the only way out. But the past has a way of catching up with you. Trust me, I know."

traits.locale_text: {n}婕伊叹了口气。{/n}“伊奥贡，亲爱的，我们有时会认为逃跑是唯一的出路。可往事总会像讨债鬼一样追上你。相信我，对此我深有体会。”

languages.text: {n}Jae soupire.{/n} « Eogunn, shereen, nous avons tous parfois l'impression que la fuite est notre seule issue, mais le passé finit toujours par nous rattraper. J'en sais quelque chose. »
languages.original_text: {n}Jae sighs.{/n} "Eogunn, shereen, we all sometimes feel that fleeing is the only way out. But the past has a way of catching up with you. Trust me, I know."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jae soupire.{/n} « Eogunn, shereen, nous avons tous parfois l'impression que la fuite est notre seule issue, mais le passé finit toujours par nous rattraper. J'en sais quelque chose. »

languages.text: {n}Jae iç çekiyor.{/n} "Eogunn, şirinim... Hepimiz bazen kaçışın tek çıkış yolu olduğunu hissederiz. Fakat geçmişin insanı yakalamak gibi bir huyu vardır. İnan bana, bilirim."
languages.original_text: {n}Jae sighs.{/n} "Eogunn, shereen, we all sometimes feel that fleeing is the only way out. But the past has a way of catching up with you. Trust me, I know."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jae iç çekiyor.{/n} "Eogunn, şirinim... Hepimiz bazen kaçışın tek çıkış yolu olduğunu hissederiz. Fakat geçmişin insanı yakalamak gibi bir huyu vardır. İnan bana, bilirim."

languages.text: {n}Jae seufzt.{/n} "Eogunn, Shereen, wir haben alle mitunter das Gefühl, dass Flucht der einzige Ausweg ist. Aber die Vergangenheit holt einen immer ein. Glaubt mir, ich weiß, wovon ich rede."
languages.original_text: {n}Jae sighs.{/n} "Eogunn, shereen, we all sometimes feel that fleeing is the only way out. But the past has a way of catching up with you. Trust me, I know."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jae seufzt.{/n} "Eogunn, Shereen, wir haben alle mitunter das Gefühl, dass Flucht der einzige Ausweg ist. Aber die Vergangenheit holt einen immer ein. Glaubt mir, ich weiß, wovon ich rede."

languages.text: {n}ジェイはため息をつく。{/n}「エオガン、シェリーン、逃げ出すことだけが唯一の出口だって、あたしたちみんな、ときどき思っちゃうものよ。でもね、過去ってやつは、必ず追いついてくる。信じて、あたしには分かるの」
languages.original_text: {n}Jae sighs.{/n} "Eogunn, shereen, we all sometimes feel that fleeing is the only way out. But the past has a way of catching up with you. Trust me, I know."

traits.locale_text: {n}ジェイはため息をつく。{/n}「エオガン、シェリーン、逃げ出すことだけが唯一の出口だって、あたしたちみんな、ときどき思っちゃうものよ。でもね、過去ってやつは、必ず追いついてくる。信じて、あたしには分かるの」
